summary: Comprehensive testing of three new ProfitPilot features completed: Dark Mode, Multi-Currency Transactions, and Tax Calculator with Country Selection. All backend APIs pass 100% (9/9 tests). All frontend UI tests pass 100%. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login API returns token (200)
Backend: POST /api/transactions with EUR currency creates transaction with currency field (201)
Backend: POST /api/transactions with GBP currency creates transaction (201)
Backend: POST /api/transactions with INR currency creates transaction (201)
Backend: POST /api/transactions without currency defaults to USD (201)
Backend: GET /api/transactions returns currency field for all transactions (200)
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/:id can update currency field (200)
Backend: GET /api/transactions/stats returns expected data structure (200)
Backend: Cleanup test transactions successful
Frontend: Theme toggle button visible in header (data-testid='theme-toggle-btn')
Frontend: Clicking toggle switches to dark theme - 'dark' class added to html element
Frontend: Clicking toggle again switches back to light theme - 'dark' class removed
Frontend: Dark mode renders with dark background (RGB: 14, 22, 37)
Frontend: All 12 sidebar navigation items present (Dashboard, Transactions, Recurring, Invoices, Clients, Reports, AI Insights, Categories, Tax Calculator, Goal Tracker, Budgets, Data Export)
Frontend: Transaction form has currency selector (data-testid='transaction-currency-select')
Frontend: Can create transaction with EUR currency
Frontend: EUR currency symbol visible in transaction list
Frontend: Tax Calculator page loads with country selector (data-testid='country-select')
Frontend: Default country is USA (United States (USD))
Frontend: Calculate button works and shows results with USA tax brackets
Frontend: Results card shows 'United States' in title
Frontend: Switching to UK changes currency symbol to GBP (£)
Frontend: UK tax brackets displayed correctly (0%, 20%, 40%, 45%)
Frontend: Results card shows 'United Kingdom' in title
Frontend: Switching to India changes currency symbol to INR (₹)
Frontend: India tax brackets displayed correctly (0%, 5%, 10%, 15%, 20%, 30%)
Frontend: Results card shows 'India' in title
Frontend: Tax brackets info card shows country-specific brackets
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed transactions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Dark Mode using next-themes with attribute='class' and defaultTheme='light' - toggle button in header switches html class between 'light' and 'dark'. 2) Multi-Currency on transactions - currency field added to Transaction model with 17 supported currencies, frontend has currency selector in transaction form. 3) Tax Calculator with 11 countries (USA, UK, Canada, Germany, France, Australia, India, Netherlands, UAE, Singapore, Japan) - each with real tax brackets, currency symbols, and country-specific notes. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
